channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Teens struggle to find summer jobs
item.description: A report predicts this summer could see the lowest teen employment rate since the U.S. government began tracking the data in 1948.

item.title: Crowd holds carjacking suspect
item.description: Chaos erupted on Boston streets as a crowd restrained a carjacking suspect who allegedly fled the scene.

item.title: Cat lands museum security job
item.description: Bone Jovi is now in charge of security at the Bone Museum in Brooklyn, New York.

item.title: Mediators see progress in first round of U.S.-Iran talks
item.description: Mediators report that U.S. and Iranian negotiators have agreed to create mechanisms for safe transits in the Strait of Hormuz and peace in Lebanon.
